def eligible_for_leadership_development_program(self) -> bool:
        age_within_range = self.age >= 20 and self.age <= 60
        years_of_service_within_range = self.years_of_service >= 5 and self.years_of_service <= 10
        leadership_feedback_score_within_range = self.leadership_feedback_score >= 4.0 and self.leadership_feedback_score <= 5.0

        return age_within_range and years_of_service_within_range and leadership_feedback_score_within_range
